---
title: "Counterfactual Thinking"
subtitle: "Causal inference, forecasting, and the art of asking *what would have happened.*"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 6
    categories: true
    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
---

## Recent Posts

::: {#recent-posts}
:::
